subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who sendeth down verses as He willeth, whereby certain servants go astray while others are guided! Ever hath He been [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحان الذی ینزل الایات کیف یشاء یضل منها عباد و یهتدی آخرون لم یزل کان
subcodes.subjects: @being a source of light; guidance, @thankfulness; gratitude, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized)
